name: CVS HEALTH Corp
summary: CVS Health Corporation is a leading health solutions company operating four segments: Health Care Benefits (Aetna), Health Services, Pharmacy & Consumer Wellness, and Corporate/Other. It serves over 37 million members through health insurance products, operates approximately 9,000 retail locations, more than 1,000 walk-in and primary care medical clinics, a pharmacy benefits manager with ~87 million plan members, and offers Medicare Advantage, Medicare PDP, Medicaid, commercial medical, dental, behavioral health, and specialty pharmacy solutions.
